PT Yield Backtest

Parameters
Note: beta_safe=1.0 means Twyne liquidates at the same threshold as the external protocol. Siphon cost (psi) is near-zero at beta=1.0.

Oracle prices from Aave PendlePriceCapAdapter reconstruction. Borrow rates from Aave V3 ReserveDataUpdated events. LiqLTV_e from emode category history.
